case_title: KLEIN BARBARA J VS PEDERSEN MARK DBA PEDERSEN & ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,121.00 FILED BY KLEIN BARBARA J AS TO DEFENDANT PEDERSEN MARK DBA PEDERSEN & ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-31-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES AGREED TO SETTLE THIS CASE W/O ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFT WILL MAIL TO PLTF W/IN 5 DAYS OF THIS HRG A CASHIER CHK IN THE AMT OF $1650.81.
WITHIN 5 DAYS OF RECEIPT OF THE CHECK, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PEDERSEN MARK DBA PEDERSEN & ASSOCIATES
